nodes.label: P5.2 — credit reach: temperature suffices, window closes the rest
nodes.rationale: w4 closes the residual 0.026 gap to the w12 ceiling at 2x backward cost (Pareto-dominates w12 itself); overlap/stride variants struck on cost; the pre-registered gap rule is not met, so Track-C global-credit machinery stays deferred — the EARN-depth thread is CLOSED cheaply.

nodes.label: P5.2 verdict: bounded window w4 closes the residual to the w12 ceiling, EARN-depth thread CLOSED
nodes.rationale: At committed temp0.2, w4 lifts tail-L12 to 0.562 (real +0.032 over w2, not real-below the 0.556 w12 ceiling) at 2x backward cost, Pareto-dominating w12 itself (5.8x cost); temp0.2/w2 remains the cost-default, w4 the bounded depth-closer for compositional tasks.

nodes.label: Track C (genuine global-credit machinery) DEFERRED — the cheap levers sufficed
nodes.rationale: The pre-registered gap rule (real-below w12 in both tail AND readout, surviving to the continual workload) is not met by the cheap levers' residual, so global-credit machinery (DFA/EBD/update-alignment) is deferred, not built; overlap/stride-2 windows were struck on cost, confirming depth comes from credit-chain length, not path multiplicity.
